title: QUOKKA Wooden Ocean Puzzles for Kids Ages 3-5 – 28 Pieces Toddlers Kids Puzzles Ages 4-8 Year Olds – Wood Ocean Toys for Children Games for Boys and Girls 6-8 yo
features: WOODEN JIGSAW PUZZLES: Ocean puzzles for kids ages 4-8; No more paper that peels off kids puzzles or mid-age silk printing/varnishing; Scratch-, water-resistant paints will survive any kid experiment and won't dim

STURDY PUZZLES FOR KIDS: you get safe European plywood opposite to plywood stuffed with sawdust or just glued chipboards that most puzzles are made of today; our modern jigsaw puzzles for kids ages 4-8 are accurate, durable, and made with love

UNIQUE WOODEN PUZZLE SHAPES: every jigsaw puzzle has 28 pieces puzzle shapes for kids to play with; We assemble them manually; Create fun learning games with Ocean; Great puzzles for kids ages 3-5 and up

ORGANIC AND DURABLE: kids puzzles age 4 and up have detailed vibrant images due to direct printing on wood with American water-based paints; puzzles improve boys' girls' hand-eye coordination, cultivate your child's patience and solving capacities

SURPRISE YOUR KIDS: our children's puzzles for ages 3-5 are challenging even for kids ages 4-8; Kids enjoy the time with friends, moms, dads, and grannies while playing with modern educational toys by QUOKKA; Exciting modern pieces kids' puzzles ages 3-5
description: Product Description Explore the wonders of the Animal Kingdom, dive deep into the mysteries of the Ocean, journey beyond the stars with Space adventures, and race through the world of Transport. Our colorful and durable puzzles are not just playtime, they're a learning journey. Elevate your child's playtime to a learning experience with our educational wooden puzzles. Designed for small hands and big imaginations, they're the perfect addition to any child's toy collection. Explore the world of Animals, Ocean, Space, and Transport with our toddler educational wooden puzzles. Designed to entertain and educate, they're a parent's best friend. Previous page Watch your child's curiosity and problem-solving skills flourish while having hours of fun. Get ready for a world of discovery with our Animal, Ocean, Space, and Transport puzzles – where learning and play come together! Nurture young minds and spark their creativity as they explore, problem-solve, and grow. Discover the joy of learning through play with our educational wooden puzzles. These beautifully crafted puzzles engage young minds, making education an adventure. Dive into the depths of the Ocean, soar among the stars in Space, embark on thrilling adventures with Transport, and meet the Animal Kingdom's fascinating creatures. Next page More puzzles Wooden Polar Puzzles Add To Basket Wooden Africa Puzzles Add To Basket 6 Realistic Ocean Puzzles Buying Options 6 Chunky Puzzles for Kids Buying Options 10 Wooden Puzzles Buying Options Realistic Wooden Puzzles Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.1 out of 5 stars 163 4.1 out of 5 stars 163 4.4 out of 5 stars 2,381 — 4.3 out of 5 stars 212 4.4 out of 5 stars 2,381 Price £8.99 £ 8 . 99 £7.99 £ 7 . 99 — — — — Brand name QUOKKA QUOKKA QUOKKA QUOKKA QUOKKA QUOKKA Theme Polar Africa Ocean Animals and fruits Animals and transport Realistic animals Number of pieces 28 28 6 6 10 6 Material Wood Wood Wood Wood Wood Wood Minimum age recommended 3+ 3+ 1+ 1+ 2+ 1+
